title: APM: Octo Demo API Gateway Threat Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of Octo API Gateway threat decisions tied to an attack ID and trace.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and 'API Gateway Threat Signal' != null | stats count as ApiGatewayThreatEvents by 'Attack ID', 'Trace ID', 'API Gateway Threat Signal'
